title: Valkyrien Skies: Tournament Reforged
description: the real tournament is about to begin...
body:
Updated to support Valkyrien 2.4.9+, added six-way thruster and six-way spinner and so on, and fixed numerous bugs, real instantaneous explosives that can trigger each other, no more altitude and speed limits, the real tournament is about to begin...

The six-way state machine RCS system greatly simplifies the manufacturing of a wide range of vehicles, including rockets, airplanes, helicopters, and even cars and motorcycles. Furthermore, its internal parameters can be modified using an NBT editor for a more powerful and customizable experience. Configurable force and torque means that force and torque of any magnitude and direction can be generated at the block's position.

Credits:Flap model and sprite from Clockwork

Tournament Continued (alex-168)

This project uses the same Apache 2.0 license as the original project.
